japanese-shoyu-ramen-pressure-cooker.name: Japanese Shoyu Ramen (pressure Cooker)
instructions: Place chicken, scallops, anchovies, shrimp, bonito flakes, half the ginger, and kombu in an electric pressure cooker. Add water; close and lock the lid. Select the Soup setting; set timer for 90 minutes according to manufacturer's instructions. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.

Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, 10 to 40 minutes. Strain broth through a colander or fine-mesh sieve. Skim the fatty oil off the top of the broth.

Combine soy sauce, mirin, sake, green onions, bonito flakes, sugar, garlic, and kombu in a medium saucepan over high heat. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer until flavors blend, about 10 minutes. Strain tare sauce through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl.
Pour 2 tablespoons of tare sauce into a large bowl. Ladle in about 2 cups of broth. Add 1/6 of the ramen noodles. Repeat with remaining tare, broth, and ramen.

jeanettes-german-red-cabbage.name: Jeanette's German Red Cabbage
instructions: Place cabbage, apples, sugar, and butter into a large pot. Pour in vinegar and water, then add salt, pepper, and cloves. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until the cabbage is tender, 1 ½ to 2 hours.

juicy-pork-loin-stuffed-with-prunes-and-.name: Juicy Pork Loin Stuffed With Prunes And Cheese
juicy-pork-loin-stuffed-with-prunes-and-.original_name: Jugoso lomo de cerdo relleno de ciruela pasa y queso

ingredients.item: 1  lomo de cerdo entero ((aproximadamente de 1,5 kg))
150 gr de queso feta o queso de cabra

instructions: It purifies the oven to 180 been 3 been (177 been 3).
Do a profound cut along the pork's back without completely separating the two halves, opening as a book.
Dig inside the back and put the pines raisins, minced cheese, onion into slices, minced garlic, minced olives and pineapple into layers and distribute them evenly.
Close the back and tie with kitchen thread to maintain shape while cooking. Dig the surface to taste.
In a big frying pan, it heats up some olive oil and dors his back across to seal his juices.
Coloca el lomo en una fuente para horno y vierte el vino blanco alrededor.
Hornea for about 1 hour and 15 minutes, or till the back is baked and golden out, sometimes bathing with the cooking juice to keep them juicy.
Retira del horno y deja reposar unos minutos antes de cortar en rodajas.
Sirve caliente, decorado con ramitas de tomillo fresco si lo deseas.
